name: www.independentpaperboard.com
message: Independent Paperboard Marketing, LLC is a problem-solving paperboard brokerage company that has built a reputation over more than twenty years as the supplier of choice for demanding paperboard converters in the U.S. They focus on key business principles such as honoring commitments, providing quality products, and building long-term relationships while constantly innovating. Established in 1994, IPM aims to extend the reach of partner mills through local representation and strong supplier relationships. Their deep expertise ensures they can meet customers' board needs amidst supply chain challenges
